bug_report.summary: Bottom dock tab strip (Output/Debugger/Audio/Animation/Shader Editor) renders differently after change
steps_to_reproduce: Open the project in the Godot editor.
Open/attach a script and type content so the Script editor is focused (as in the scenario).
Observe the bottom dock tab strip area (Output/Debugger/Audio/Animation/Shader Editor).
expected_behaviors: Bottom dock tab strip styling (borders/highlight/padding) is consistent and unchanged between builds for the same editor state.
actual_behaviors: Bottom dock tab strip styling differs (border/highlight rendering in the tab strip area changes) between before/after for the same step/state.
